title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower. the main contract I2309 closed 806.5. an decrease of 0.92% throughout theday; some traders quotation is still stronger; steel mills purchased on demand; today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
